zh.lifeSummary: 當Otto von Hohenstaufen I,  Pfalzgraf von Burgund於1167年出生在德國貝也史瓦本時，他的父親Friedrich I. 'Barbarossa' römisch-deutscher Kaiser45歲，母親Béatrice Ire de Bourgogne24歲。他於1190年與Marguerite de Blois結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1200年1月13日在法國福朗-可特艾度布斯貝桑c享年33歲，埋葬在法國福朗-可特艾度布斯貝桑c。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Otto von Hohenstaufen I,  Pfalzgraf von Burgund于1167年出生在德国貝也史瓦本时，他的父亲Friedrich I. 'Barbarossa' römisch-deutscher Kaiser45岁，母亲Béatrice Ire de Bourgogne24岁。他于1190年与Marguerite de Blois结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1200年1月13日在法国福朗-可特艾度布斯貝桑c享年33岁，埋葬在法国福朗-可特艾度布斯貝桑c。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Otto
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a short form of any of the various Germanic compound personal names containing the element od, ot ‘prosperity, wealth’ ( compare the corresponding Old English ēad in names such as Edward and Edwin ). St Otto of Bamberg ( d. 1139 ) was a missionary to the Pomeranians. Otto the Great ( 912–73 ) is generally regarded as the founder of the Holy Roman Empire, and the name has been borne by several members of German and Austrian royal houses. It was recorded occasionally among immigrants to England from the Low Countries in the 14th century, but failed to establish itself. Since the 19th century it has again been used occasionally in the English-speaking world, mostly among immigrants from Germanic countries.

en.lifeSummary: When Otto von Hohenstaufen I,  Pfalzgraf von Burgund was born in 1167, in Swabia, Bavaria, Germany, his father, Friedrich I. 'Barbarossa' römisch-deutscher Kaiser, was 45 and his mother, Béatrice Ire de Bourgogne, was 24. He married Marguerite de Blois in 1190. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died on 13 January 1200, in Besançon, Doubs, Franche-Comté, France, at the age of 33, and was buried in Besançon, Doubs, Franche-Comté, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Otto von Hohenstaufen I,  Pfalzgraf von Burgund est né en 1167, à Schwaben, Bayern, Allemagne, son père, Friedrich I. 'Barbarossa' römisch-deutscher Kaiser, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Béatrice Ire de Bourgogne, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Marguerite de Blois en 1190. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé le 13 janvier 1200, à Besançon, Doubs, Franche-Comté, France, à l’âge de 33 ans, et a été enterré à Besançon, Doubs, Franche-Comté, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Otto von Hohenstaufen I,  Pfalzgraf von Burgund 1167 in Schwaben, Bayern, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Friedrich I. 'Barbarossa' römisch-deutscher Kaiser 45 und seine Mutter Béatrice Ire de Bourgogne 24. Er hat 1190 Marguerite de Blois geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb am 13. Januar 1200 im Alter von 33 Jahren in Besançon, Doubs, Franche-Comté, Frankreich und wurde in Besançon, Doubs, Franche-Comté, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Otto von Hohenstaufen I,  Pfalzgraf von Burgund è nato il nel 1167 nel Schwaben, Bayern, Germania, il suo padre, Friedrich I. 'Barbarossa' römisch-deutscher Kaiser, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Béatrice Ire de Bourgogne, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Marguerite de Blois nel 1190. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 13 gennaio 1200, nel Besançon, Doubs, Franche-Comté, Francia, all'età di 33 anni, e fu sepolto a Besançon, Doubs, Franche-Comté, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Otto von Hohenstaufen I,  Pfalzgraf von Burgundが1167年にドイツバイエルンスチワベンで生まれた時，父Friedrich I. 'Barbarossa' römisch-deutscher Kaiserは45歳，母Béatrice Ire de Bourgogneは24歳であった。1190年にMarguerite de Bloisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1200年1月13日にフランスフランチェ-コムトeドウブズベサンcオンで33歳で死去し，フランスフランチェ-コムトeドウブズベサンcオンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Otto von Hohenstaufen I,  Pfalzgraf von Burgund(이)가 1167년 독일 베이른 슈와벤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Friedrich I. 'Barbarossa' römisch-deutscher Kaiser(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Béatrice Ire de Bourgogne(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1190년 Marguerite de Blois(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1200년 1월 13일 프랑스 프랭체-코트e 다브스 베산c에서 33세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 프랭체-코트e 다브스 베산c에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Otto von Hohenstaufen I,  Pfalzgraf von Burgund nasceu em 1167, em Schwaben, Bayern, Alemanha, seu pai, Friedrich I. 'Barbarossa' römisch-deutscher Kaiser, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Béatrice Ire de Bourgogne, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Marguerite de Blois em 1190. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 13 de janeiro de 1200, em Besançon, Doubs, Franche-Comté, França, com 33 anos, e foi sepultado em Besançon, Doubs, Franche-Comté, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Otto von Hohenstaufen I,  Pfalzgraf von Burgund родился в 1167 г. в местности щвабен, беиирн, Германия, его отцу по имени Friedrich I. 'Barbarossa' römisch-deutscher Kaiser было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Béatrice Ire de Bourgogne, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Marguerite de Blois в 1190 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер 13 января 1200 г. в местности бесанcон, доубс, фрэнче-комтe, Франция в возрасте 33 лет и был похоронен в местности бесанcон, доубс, фрэнче-комтe, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Otto von Hohenstaufen I,  Pfalzgraf von Burgund nació en 1167, en Schwaben, Bayern, Alemania, su papá, Friedrich I. 'Barbarossa' römisch-deutscher Kaiser, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Béatrice Ire de Bourgogne, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Marguerite de Blois en 1190. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió el 13 de enero de 1200, en Besançon, Doubs, Franche-Comté, Francia, a la edad de 33 años, y fue sepultado en Besançon, Doubs, Franche-Comté, Francia.
